name: Sweet-And-Sour Beet-Carrot Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet.
2. Stir-fry the beets, carrots, onions, and raisins for several minutes over medium-high heat.
3. Add the remaining ingredients; lower heat.
4. Toss well to combine everything.
5. Cover and steam until the vegetables are tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
